docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-02-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-02-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT AND WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GIANNINI & HOLLAND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TOOLIJIAN, BRIAN $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,090.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GIANNINI & HOLLAND AS TO DEFENDANT TOOLIJIAN, BRIAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-02-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GIANNINI & HOLLAND
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-02-2016 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED JAN-12-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TOOLIJIAN, BRIAN
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT RETURNED = UNABLE TO FORWARD/FOR REVIEW
